2377480.name: Suds
2377480.description:
Welcome to Suds!

Suds is all about teamwork and having fun with your friends. You play as a Sud, a brave little creature. Your village is a beautiful place full of flowers, but monster slimes are attacking it. It is up to you and your mates to stop them. But watch out, there is a secret...

Game Modes

We have different ways to play, so you can enjoy the game with friends or on your own.

  • Endless Mode (Multiplayer): Fight waves of enemies that just keep coming. Your main job is simple: survive! The monster slimes get stronger, so you must help your team and use your skills well. But do mind, points are also an important thing. It is all about your contribution! The winner is the one with the most points, even if they die during the battle. You still need your team to survive, but your personal score is key.

  • Infection Mode (Multiplayer): This mode is a proper challenge! The infection moves around and players take turns being the infected one. Your mission is to keep everyone safe. If your team survives all the waves of enemies, you win the match. If one friend is defeated, the game is over.

  • Corrida Mode (Single-player): It is like a bullfight! You face an infected enemy who charges at you. But be careful, they are not a giant boss. They are the same size as you! This makes them fast and tricky. You must be clever to dodge their attacks and use their speed against them.

More Features

  • Offline Quests: If you want to play alone, there is a single-player mode with loads of quests. You will meet new enemies and solve different problems. It is a brilliant way to get better at the game and explore what is like to be a sud on your own.

  • Power-ups and Secrets: There are special items hidden in the game to help you. What do they do? You have to find out yourself! Play the game, look for secrets, and use their power to save your friends.
2377480.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语
